text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 417 

SPECIALTY_ACCESS 

LABEL: Plan Requires Specialty Pharmacies for Some Drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the Part D plan restricts access for some drugs to certain specialty 
pharmacies. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: SPECIALTY_ACCESS 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
 N = No 
 9 = Not applicable 
 X = Unknown 

COMMENT: This
